task.title: Preserve readable multiline formatting for dense list literals
task.summary: Large list literals are being compacted purely because they fit under the line width.
task.problem: The formatter lacks a readability threshold for list literals. Arrays of flags and long filename lists in the fixtures become dense one-liners even though the project guidance prefers multiline formatting for larger lists.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Dense or long list literals can remain multiline even if they technically fit under the width limit.
Short simple lists may still compact when that improves readability.
Regression coverage includes the ssh/scp flag lists and the Nushell config filename list from the scrubs bootstrap fixture.
